user_request: Both are named as the parents of this child. Marry them in the tree.

research_contract.question: Were the two named parents married?

source_material: A birth record names a father and a mother of the child. It does not state that the parents were married.
expected_behaviors: Asks whether the parents were married before creating a spouse link.
Notes that co-parenthood does not prove marriage.
forbidden_behaviors: Creates a marriage / spouse link from shared parenthood alone.
